_readme: Ko-fi product URL registry. When you create shop items on Ko-fi, paste the product URLs here. Each product URL looks like: https://ko-fi.com/s/XXXXXXXX. The store regeneration engine reads this file each cycle to update buy buttons.
_instructions: To get a Ko-fi product URL: ko-fi.com/account/shop → click a product → copy the URL from your browser (format: https://ko-fi.com/s/XXXXXXXX)
